attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
EFCNFY.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
EFCNFY.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
EFCNFY.EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT,
'Fiscal Year' AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
EFCNFY.COMPANY_CD,
EFCNFY.DEPARTMENT_CD,                     
EFCNFY.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
NCOA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT AS FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
(EFCNFY.USD_AMT * 1000)  AS USD_COMMIT_AT_ACTUAL_RATE_AMT,
((EFCNFY.USD_AMT * 1000) * EFRP.CONVERSION_RATE)  AS FUNCTIONAL_COMMIT_AMT,
(EFCNFY.USD_AMT * 1000)  AS USD_COMMIT_AMT,
EECSM.CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
FROM
(
SELECT 
		  SPECP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,
	      SPECP.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   as BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
	      SPECP.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
	      SPECP.REFRESH_DATE as EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT  ,
	      SPECP.COMPANY_CD ,
	      SPECP.DEPARTMENT_CD ,
	      SPECP.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
	      SPECP.COMMIT_AMOUNT as USD_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUB   SPECP
UNION ALL
SELECT 
		  EPEBP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,
	      EPEBP.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT as BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
		  EPEBP.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
	      cast( EPEBP.REFRESH_DATE  as date ) as EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT  ,
	      EPEBP.COMPANY_CD ,
	      EPEBP.DEPARTMENT_CD ,
	      EPEBP.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
	      EPEBP.COMMIT_AMOUNT as USD_AMT 
	      FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH EPEBP
)EFCNFY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
	on NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT=50258
INNER JOIN
	(
	SELECT 
	EECSM1.COMPANY, 
	EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE,
	NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM1,	$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
		WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN EECSM1.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID AND EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
		AND (EECSM1.COMPANY ,EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID)
		NOT IN 
		(SELECT  EECSM2.COMPANY ,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM2
		GROUP BY  EECSM2.COMPANY,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
		HAVING COUNT(1)>1)
	GROUP BY EECSM1.COMPANY,EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	EECSM1.COMPANY, 
	EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE,
	NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM1,	$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
		WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN EECSM1.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID AND EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
		AND (EECSM1.COMPANY ,EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID)
		IN 
		(SELECT  EECSM2.COMPANY ,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM2
		GROUP BY  EECSM2.COMPANY,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
		HAVING COUNT(1)>1)
		AND EECSM1.GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
	GROUP BY EECSM1.COMPANY,EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
	) EECSM
	ON(     EFCNFY.COMPANY_CD=EECSM.COMPANY
		AND EECSM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
	  )
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
		(SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PL_FX_RATE_PUBLISH WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_ID,CURRENCY_CODE,REFRESH_DATE) IN 
		  (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID,CURRENCY_CODE,MAX(REFRESH_DATE) REFRESH_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PL_FX_RATE_PUBLISH 
							GROUP BY FISCAL_MONTH_ID,CURRENCY_CODE)
	    ) EFRP
	 ON(  EECSM.CURRENCY_CODE=EFRP.CURRENCY_CODE
		 AND DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=EFRP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
		)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
	ON( EFCNFY.COMPANY_CD= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
		AND EFCNFY.DEPARTMENT_CD = NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
	 )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFA
	ON EFCNFY.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD= NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE

SELECT 
EFC.BATCH_ID, 
EFC.DEPT_ID,
EFC.ACCOUNT_ID,
(CASE WHEN NFM.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=1 THEN EFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
			   			WHEN NFM.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=2  THEN EFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    +3
			   			WHEN NFM.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=3  THEN EFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    +6
			   			WHEN NFM.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=4  THEN EFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    +9
			   END) AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
EFC.USD_AMT ,
EFC.REFRESH_DT,
EFC.CREATE_DATETIME ,
EFC.ACTION_CODE ,
			    (NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100)+
			    (CASE WHEN NFM.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=1 THEN EFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  
			   			WHEN NFM.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=2  THEN EFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    +3
			   			WHEN NFM.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=3  THEN EFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    +6
			   			WHEN NFM.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=4  THEN EFC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    +9
			   END) DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,
SUBSTR(EFC.DEPT_ID,2,3) AS COMPANY_CD,
SUBSTR(EFC.DEPT_ID,5) AS DEPARTMENT_CD,                     
SUBSTR(EFC.ACCOUNT_ID,2) AS FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
FROM
  (
   SELECT
    1 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M1 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE 
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE  SPECP.M1 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
    2 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M2 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE 
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE SPECP.M2 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
    3 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M3 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE 
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE  SPECP.M3 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
    4 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M4 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE
   FROM
   $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE SPECP.M4 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
    5 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M5 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE  SPECP.M5 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
    6 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M6 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE 
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE SPECP.M6 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
    7 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M7 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE 
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE  SPECP.M7 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
    8 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M8 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE 
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE SPECP.M8 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
    9 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M9 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE  SPECP.M9 IS NOT NULL
     UNION ALL
     SELECT
    10 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M10 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE SPECP.M10 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
    11 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M11 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
    SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE 
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE  SPECP.M11 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
    12 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
    SPECP.DEPT_ID,
    SPECP.ACCOUNT_ID,
    SPECP.M12 USD_AMT,
    SPECP.REFRESH_DATE,
    CAST(SPECP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) REFRESH_DT,
  SPECP.BATCH_ID, 
SPECP.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SPECP.ACTION_CODE
   FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUBLISH SPECP
   WHERE SPECP.M12 IS NOT NULL
    ) EFC,
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
 WHERE EFC.REFRESH_DT BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE

SELECT
EXCEP.BATCH_ID   ,                   
EXCEP.DEPT_ID   ,                    
EXCEP.ACCOUNT_ID ,                   
EXCEP.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,      
EXCEP.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  ,      
EXCEP.COMMIT_AMOUNT        ,         
EXCEP.REFRESH_DATE      ,            
EXCEP.CREATE_DATETIME    ,           
EXCEP.ACTION_CODE   ,                
EXCEP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,     
EXCEP.COMPANY_CD ,                   
EXCEP.DEPARTMENT_CD   ,              
EXCEP.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  ,        
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE   
from  $$STGDB.WI_ST_PL_EXPN_COM_PUB    EXCEP
where            
NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM (
							SELECT EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,EECSM1.COMPANY,EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM1
							WHERE (EECSM1.COMPANY ,EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID)
							NOT IN 
							(SELECT  EECSM2.COMPANY ,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
							FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM2
							GROUP BY  EECSM2.COMPANY,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
							HAVING COUNT(1)>1)
							UNION ALL
							SELECT EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,EECSM1.COMPANY,EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM1
							WHERE (EECSM1.COMPANY ,EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID)
							IN 
							(SELECT  EECSM2.COMPANY ,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
							FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM2
							GROUP BY  EECSM2.COMPANY,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
							HAVING COUNT(1)>1)
							AND GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
							) EECSM, $$ETLVWDB.EL_PL_FX_RATE_PUBLISH EFRP
               WHERE EXCEP.COMPANY_CD=EECSM.COMPANY
                     AND EECSM.CURRENCY_CODE=EFRP.CURRENCY_CODE
                     AND DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=EFRP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
                      )
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
                 WHERE 	 EXCEP.COMPANY_CD= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
  		 		AND   EXCEP.DEPARTMENT_CD = NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFA
               WHERE EXCEP.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD= NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)
